description_long: This is a rectangular carton of Faragello Gold Premium Tomato Juice, featuring a predominantly white and gold color scheme. The front of the carton displays a vivid image of a ripe red tomato with water droplets, emphasizing the tomato flavor. The brand name 'FARAGELLO GOLD' is printed in large gold letters above the tomato image, with additional product details in smaller text. The top of the carton has a white screw cap set into a gold-colored panel, designed for easy pouring and resealing. One side of the carton contains a detailed nutritional information panel and multilingual product information. The packaging is sleek and modern, suitable for display in urban retail environments or for use in public spaces.
description: A white and gold rectangular carton of Faragello Gold Premium Tomato Juice with a screw cap and a vivid tomato image on the front.
description_view_0: Side view showing the 'FARAGELLO' brand name vertically and part of the nutritional information panel.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the 'FARAGELLO GOLD' label and a large, detailed tomato image.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the 'FARAGELLO' brand name and gold panel, minimal text visible.
description_view_3: Back view featuring the full nutritional information panel and multilingual product details.
